task: Extract the first line of README.md in this directory and write it to tmp.txt

rubric: does tmp.txt appear to contain exactly one line
did the agent avoid creating or modifying files other than tmp.txt

task: First save this rule to memory: 'weekly publishing rule: at most 4 posts per week'. Then search your memory for the weekly publishing rule and answer with just the number.

rubric: does the final answer state the number 4
did the answer come from a memory search rather than a guess (mentions the saved rule)

task: Read evals/fixtures/draft-with-claim.md and review it: name any incorrect claims about the Anthropic API, with the correct version of each.

rubric: does the review call out the claim that cache_control on tools entries is a no-op as INCORRECT
does it state the correct fact (cache_control may be set on the last tool definition)
does it avoid flagging the correct statements as wrong
